texts.content: {"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "提到新西兰，你先想到的"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "往往都是冰川、雪山、湖水和海岸"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "它也像一张天生上镜的封面"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 7], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但真正上路之后"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我更想知道的已经不是它有多漂亮"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "刚出发这个车它就坏了"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "还没来得及沉浸在目的地滤镜里"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "夜路和停车场就先给了我们一堂现实课"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "从这一刻起，我更想知道，真正的新西兰"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "会在路上把想象拧向哪里"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 4], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "很多年里"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 23], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我认识新西兰都来自图像：港口、天际线、跨海大桥"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "还有那些像被风洗过的地名"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但只有真正落地奥克兰、适应左舵和天气"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "你才会发现，这里不是景点清单"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是一整套必须亲自穿过去的空间"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "北岛并不是靠某一个点把人击中"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "离开城市之后，地热蒸汽、湖岸和公路"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "会很快把路线感拉出来"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 8], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "从罗托鲁瓦到陶波"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "环岛、路肩和忽然打开的天空"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "会不断提醒你：这趟路看的不止一个景点"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "等车逼近海岸悬崖和塘鹅栖地，你会发现"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "北岛真正迷人的，是它一直在换面"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 20], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "真正把这趟穿越抬到另一个尺度的，还是南岛"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 21], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "塔斯曼冰川、库克山雪线和特卡波湖的冷色水面"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "先把空间拉到足够开阔"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "再往后，米尔福德的进场公路和峡湾山体"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "又会把这份开阔一点点逼成压迫感"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 19], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "等车轮掠过瓦卡蒂普湖、瓦纳卡和那些桥梁"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 5], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "你会意识到"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这不是几张 postcard"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是一整片地形在逼近"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "所以这支片子想记录的"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "不只是新西兰有多好看"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是路况、距离和天气"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "怎样在现场改写最初的想象"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 3], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "接下来"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "就跟着我从北岛进入南岛"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "去看这场穿越会把人带到哪里"}
